criteria.description: handoff-manifest.yaml passes u-handoff-validator (13 rules + sha256) AND is marked Status: approved
No INVALID status in any file under SPECS_DIR/_validation/
Every sdd_improve_*_spec-reviewer task reached terminal status completed (targeted-mode substitute for all_domains_validated)
All error.code values found in in-scope spec files are registered in SPECS_DIR/error-codes.md (scoped to touched domains on /u-improve via --workflow-id; global for u-spec/greenfield)

SIEGARD-05 — every spec artifact listed in handoff-manifest.yaml (backend_package/frontend_package paths, compliance_report, feature/flow paths) is git-tracked with no uncommitted changes. The Orchestrator-SDD commits the generated specs before phase_exit_approved so they are never lost as untracked files.
